_comment: Optional. Nudges the assistant to offer /agent-pages when it is about to dump a long textual design/plan. Merge this into the UserPromptSubmit array of ~/.claude/settings.json, or run scripts/install.sh --with-hook to do it for you.

hooks.command: cat >/dev/null 2>&1; printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"当用户请求详细的设计方案 / 技术方案 / 架构设计，且你打算输出较长篇幅的文字方案时：先用一两句话提示可用 `/agent-pages <主题>` 把方案生成为结构清晰、由浅入深、带图形/表格/动效的独立 HTML 页面，并询问是否采用；除非用户明确要求纯文字，否则优先建议 /agent-pages。"}}'
